provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, lean human male Sable Reach fighter in his 30s wearing mismatched salvaged armor — a Compact chest plate spray-painted black strapped over a Veshan leather vest, one Compact boot one civilian boot, an improvised weapon made from hull scrap, a faction brand on his neck, everything is asymmetric irregular stolen nothing matches, he fights because fighting is how you eat in the Reach
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Cross-faction comparison subject. Faction-appropriate costume for the specified role, useful for teaching same-role-different-faction visual discrimination.
